introSection: Terror Twister is a steel roller coaster located at Fantawild Adventure in Zhongmu, Zhengzhou, Henan, China. It is a SkyLoop installation from Maurer Rides.
fullText: Terror Twister is a steel roller coaster located at Fantawild Adventure in Zhongmu, Zhengzhou, Henan, China. It is a SkyLoop installation from Maurer Rides.
